[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011001 4
1 1011001 4
2 0001011 3
3 1100101 4
4 1111111 a
5 1111111 a
6 0011011 4
7 0110111 5

01 0000101 2
12 1001000 2
23 0100110 3
34 0000000 a
45 0110100 3
56 1000011 3
67 0101000 2
70 0010000 1

02 1000000 1
13 1101010 4
24 0000000 a
35 0010000 1
46 0000111 3
57 1000011 3
60 0011000 2
71 0010000 1

14 1001000 2
25 0110100 3
36 0000001 1
47 0100111 4
50 0000010 1
61 0010000 1
72 0000000 a

15 0101000 2
26 0000111 3
37 0000001 1
40 0010010 2
51 0000001 1
62 0001000 1
73 0000000 a

05 0100100 2
16 1000010 2
27 0100111 4
30 0010000 1
41 0010101 3
52 1000000 1
63 0101000 2
74 0000000 a

17 1101010 4

64 0001000 1
75 0010000 1

07 1100101 4 match 3
10 0001010 2
21 0010101 3
32 0000000 a
43 0100110 3

65 0111000 3
76 0000000 a
